response.justification: Bogdan has extensive experience in software development across multiple languages and domains, but his background is heavily skewed toward web, mobile, and scripting languages (TypeScript, JavaScript, Node.js, React) rather than C++ and industrial automation systems. His C++ experience is limited to early roles (e.g., National Instruments) and lacks depth in STL, multi-threading, or industrial cybersecurity standards like IEC 62443. His strengths lie in full-stack development, DevOps, and open-source contributions, which are misaligned with the core C++ and industrial automation focus of the role.
strengths: Strong full-stack development experience with TypeScript, Node.js, and React
Proven expertise in DevOps, CI/CD, and infrastructure automation
Active open-source contributor with event-driven and distributed systems projects
concerns: Limited recent or in-depth C++/STL experience (early career roles only)
No demonstrated experience with industrial automation protocols (Modbus, OPC UA) or IEC 62443 cybersecurity standards
Lack of exposure to cloud platforms (e.g., Azure) or high-performance multi-threaded systems in industrial contexts
